app.name: Warframe Items API
app.one_liner: A comprehensive JavaScript library that provides up-to-date Warframe item data sourced directly from official mobile API endpoints, enriched with drop rates, patch logs, rivens, and in-game identifiers.

screens.name: Item Browser
screens.purpose: Display and search through the complete collection of Warframe items with their enriched metadata.
primary_actions: Search items by name or in-game path
View drop rates and patch logs

rust_commands.name: save_item
rust_commands.purpose: Persist a Warframe item's enriched data to local storage or database.

mvp_plan: week 1: Implement enrichment pipeline for drop rates and patch logs
week 1: Integrate official Warframe mobile API endpoints
week 1: Set up automated release triggers on game updates
acceptance_tests: Confirm Windows NTFS filesystem does not block git operations during local development
Validate that all craftable items include productCategory inside components
Verify new items are added within 24 hours of a Warframe game update
